summary: Make doctor ref fixture independent of published tags
description: Use an intentionally absent valid stack ref so the doctor mismatch test remains deterministic before and after a release tag exists.
acceptance: Doctor mismatch test passes whether or not v0.3.1 exists locally.

evidence.summary: RED: post-tag release-check failed because v0.3.1 now resolved to HEAD, invalidating the intended mismatch fixture. GREEN: fixture declares absent valid ref v9.9.9; focused test and full 75-test Linux/pilots suite pass.
